prestazioni: 1ZZ-FE (1.8L) or 2ZZ-GE (1.8L) engine swap with HKS GT-SS turbo kit (Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo, HKS 264° camshafts, HKS Hi-Power exhaust manifold, and HKS F-Con V Pro ECU reflash for 250+ hp on 98 RON fuel)

Tein Flex Z coilovers with custom valving for the Wish's 4WD (ZNE10G/ZNE14G) chassis, paired with Cusco 22mm front and 19mm rear sway bars and polyurethane bushings (Whiteline W51210 for front control arms)
Cusco 1.5-way mechanical LSD (80% lock) for the 4WD models, combined with a TRD 4.3 final gear ratio (part #41201-20040) and Koyoritsu 550cc/min fuel injectors for forced induction builds
estetica: Vertex Lang II widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear bumper) with custom carbon fiber side skirts (Seibon CFRP, part #TOY-WISH-SK) for aggressive stance on 18x9.5 +15 ET Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels
TRD Gen 2 rear spoiler (part #53151-20010) with a custom 3D-printed Gurney flap (ABS plastic, 15mm height) and a Veilside Fortune front bumper lip (JDM-spec, part #VS-FL-01)

Full custom interior with Bride Euro II reclinable bucket seats (part #BRIDE-EURO2-TOYOTA), TRD shift knob (part #00001-17010) for the 6-speed manual swap, and a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede, part #MOMO-350-SUEDE) with a NRG quick-release hub
